system.description:
Tactical Overwatch is the Field Technician discipline for runners who decided that the real fight happens before anyone pulls a trigger. They specialize in environmental control: sensor packages, deployable cover modules, automated turrets, and the soft tools that turn an empty intersection into a managed killbox. Most of them came up adjacent to private security architecture teams and have strong opinions about line of sight.

On the job, the Tactical Overwatch operator is everywhere the team is not yet. Their entry feature is Forward Position: at the start of any encounter, they may deploy a chosen utility package (sensor mast, cover module, or automated suppressor turret) into an adjacent square as a free action.
system.grants: Forward Position: deploy one chosen utility package (sensor, cover, or turret) for free at encounter start.

wizard.tagline: Build the killbox before the enemy realizes they have entered one
